title: Pet Munchies Duck Drumsticks Dog Treats, Premium Dental Sticks with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat 100g (8 Pack)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL DUCK: This gourmet dental treat is made with succulent 100% natural, human-grade duck breast meat wrapped around a calcium bone - delicately roasted to perfection

HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: Our duck drumsticks contain no artificial colours or flavours, are naturally low in fat & salt and contain essentials vitamins A & E, making them the perfect treat to feed your four legged friends
FOR HEALTHY TEETH & GUMS: Designed to satisfy your dogs natural instinct to chew, helping to remove tartar and plaque to support good oral health

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our duck drumsticks are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: From the manufacturer About Us Pet Munchies is a range of premium, gourmet treats made with high quality, natural human grade meat and fish. The treats provide natural textures, flavours and exceptional palatability that dogs and cats love. Delicious, nutritious and wholesome, we use the fine chicken, duck, beef liver, venison, lamb, buffalo, ocean white fish and wild salmon. All our meat and fish are delicately baked to perfection in its own natural juices, to preserve flavour and quality. Our commitment We are committed to sourcing the finest ingredients and ensuring all our treats are made with 100% natural human grade meat, that are full of flavour, including grain and gluten free varieties. Your four-legged best friend deserve a life without boundaries. Where they can walk, run, climb, jump and play to their heart’s content. And we do our utmost to help you give it to them.

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool place out of the reach of children and animals.
specifications_table.Special features: ‎Free from artificial colours,and flavours., Ideal for young & growing dogs., Natural premium gourmet treat, made with 100% natural human grade duck breast meat, delicately roasted to perfection and wrapped around a calcium bone., Naturally low in fat & high in protein.
